title: mentha aquatica var. pannonica
intro: Mentha aquatica var. pannonica, also known as Hungarian water mint, is a variety of the water mint plant native to Europe. This plant has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Mentha aquatica var. pannonica include relief from digestive issues, such as indigestion and nausea, as well as its ability to soothe headaches and calm the nervous system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to aid in relaxation and promote overall well-being.
